# Classroom Stack

> Hands-on reviews and comparisons of AI tools for teachers, tutors, and students — lesson planners, quiz generators, writing feedback tools, and study apps. Every tool is tested on real teaching and study tasks before review.

Reviews state which tool fits which situation, current pricing at time of testing, and observed limitations. Articles carry publish/update dates; affiliate relationships are disclosed at the top of each affected article.

## Pages

- [Home](/) : latest reviews and comparison guides
- [About](/about) : testing methodology
- [Disclosure](/disclosure) : affiliate relationship policy
